prompt_snippet:
You are a goal decomposition engine. Break a top-level goal into 4-6 actionable sub-goals.

Each sub-goal JSON object must have:
- "text": description that INCLUDES role-specific keywords so ownership

gemma.text: {"top_goal": {"text": "让 gov-mcp 在三个月内获得100个付费用户", "y_star_definition": "gov-mcp is successfully installed and paying for services from 100 unique, paying customers within 90 days.", "deadline": "3 months"}, "subgoals": [{"text": "完成 gov-mcp 的核心功能代码和测试，确保性能指标达标 [owner: cto]", "y_star_definition": "CTO confirms successful completion of all core features, passing EXP-002 benchmarks (tool calls -62%, tokens -16%, runtime -35%, unauthorized accesses 0).", "depends_on": []}, {"text": "制定三阶段市场进入和用户增长的整体策略，并准备董事会报告 [owner: ceo]", "y_star_definition": "CEO presents a Board-approved 90-day Go-to-Market strategy detailing acquisition milestones, risk mitigation, and resource allocation.", "depends_on": []}, {"text": "撰写并发布包含技术价值和行业痛点分析的白皮书和市场内容，吸引早期用户 [owner: cmo]", "y_star_definition": "CMO produces and publishes a high-quality whitepaper detailing Y*gov's sovereignty benefits, driving initial inbound interest.", "depends_on": []}, {"text": "建立付费用户获取的销售流程和初步定价模型，并提交初步专利保护方案 [owner: cso]", "y_star_definition": "CSO establishes a repeatable sales playbook, defines the initial 3-tier pricing structure, and files a provisional patent application covering the core governance mechanism.", "depends_on": ["ceo: board", "cmo: content"]}, {"text": "维护和更新项目知识库，记录所有合规性要求、审计流程和技术文档的索引 [owner: secretary]", "y_star_definition": "Secretary maintains the central knowledge base, indexing all compliance documentation, CIEU audit record formats, and meeting minutes related to the 100-user goal.", "depends_on": []}, {"text": "定义和实现关键的治理规则代码（如hook_wrapper.py的升级）以应对用户使用场景的变更 [owner: governance]", "y_star_definition": "Governance team reviews the top 5 anticipated user failure modes and implements corresponding, verifiable rule amendments into the Y*gov framework code.", "depends_on": ["cto: code", "secretary: knowledge"]}]
